Accueil/Arcade/East Runner

East Runner

Arcade4.740k parties jouées

Help the prince to run faster than everyone! Run as far as you can. Collect coins and buy things in the store. Become the best runner of the East! Endless game with great graphics to keep you playing. Run without hitting obstacles in the eastern safari.
